answers.where: Hangar screen with the owned hero mech on the blue build pad.
answers.action: Press BATTLE to test the mech against drones.
answers.response: The sourced Assault Walker hero model is visible as the primary mech instead of the previous weak blocky body.
answers.reward: The player can see salvage is the resource for unlocking the shoulder module.
answers.game_look: Bright toy-block world, studs-like ground detail, cockpit, twin guns, chunky legs, and readable module lock panel create a Roblox-like mech game read.

issues.text: Assault Walker is now a much stronger sourced hero silhouette, but authored rigged motion, final lighting, and credits polish still need follow-up.
